tests.name: pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/functionSymbols returns null when the node is not a variable declarator or is missing a usable function assignment
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/functionSymbols creates symbols for arrow functions, function declarations, and function expressions assigned to variables
